start:
Hi {}, I'm Ak Unzipper Bot рҹҳҮ!

рҹ“Ӯ YбҙҸбҙңКҖ бҙңКҹбҙӣЙӘбҙҚбҙҖбҙӣбҙҮ AКҖбҙ„КңЙӘбҙ бҙҮ ExбҙӣКҖбҙҖбҙ„бҙӣбҙҸКҖ BбҙҸбҙӣ!

рҹҡҖ FбҙҮбҙҖбҙӣбҙңКҖбҙҮкңұ:
вҖў IЙҙкңұбҙӣбҙҖЙҙбҙӣ ZIP, RAR, 7Z, TAR бҙҮxбҙӣКҖбҙҖбҙ„бҙӣЙӘбҙҸЙҙ
вҖў FбҙҖкңұбҙӣ & SбҙҮбҙ„бҙңКҖбҙҮ бҙҳКҖбҙҸбҙ„бҙҮкңұкңұЙӘЙҙЙў
вҖў DЙӘКҖбҙҮбҙ„бҙӣ URL SбҙңбҙҳбҙҳбҙҸКҖбҙӣ
вҖў PбҙҖкңұкңұбҙЎбҙҸКҖбҙ… PКҖбҙҸбҙӣбҙҮбҙ„бҙӣбҙҮбҙ… AКҖбҙ„КңЙӘбҙ бҙҮкңұ

вҡ пёҸ 18+ бҙ„бҙҸЙҙбҙӣбҙҮЙҙбҙӣ ЙӘкңұ кңұбҙӣКҖЙӘбҙ„бҙӣКҹКҸ бҙҳКҖбҙҸКңЙӘКҷЙӘбҙӣбҙҮбҙ…! A кңұЙӘЙҙЙўКҹбҙҮ бҙ ЙӘбҙҸКҹбҙҖбҙӣЙӘбҙҸЙҙ бҙЎЙӘКҹКҹ КҹбҙҮбҙҖбҙ… бҙӣбҙҸ бҙҖ бҙҳбҙҮКҖбҙҚбҙҖЙҙбҙҮЙҙбҙӣ КҷбҙҖЙҙ.

рҹ“Ө Jбҙңкңұбҙӣ кңұбҙҮЙҙбҙ… бҙҖЙҙКҸ бҙҖКҖбҙ„КңЙӘбҙ бҙҮ кң°ЙӘКҹбҙҮ бҙӣбҙҸ кңұбҙӣбҙҖКҖбҙӣ!

Made with вқӨпёҸ by @Anujedits76
about:
About Ak Unzipper Bot,

вңҳ Version: {}
вңҳ Language: Python
вңҳ Framework: Pyrogram
вңҳ Developer: Anuj Kumar
вңҳ Made with вқӨпёҸ by @anujedits76
canceled:
**{} вң…!**

`Now all of your files have been deleted from my server рҹҳҸ!`
log:
**Extract Log рҹ“қ!**

**User ID:** `{}`
**Forward from:** `{}` (`{}`)
**File Name:** `{}`
**File Size:** `{}`
help_head: Get help by clicking on these buttons рҹҳҮ
help_extract:
**How to extract? рҹӨ”**

**1.** `Send the file or link that you want to extract.`
**2.** `Click on extract button (If you sent a link use "Url Extract" button. If it's a file just use "File Extract" button).`


**Note:**
    **1.** `If your archive is password protected select` **(Password) Extract рҹ“Ӯ** `mode. Bot isn't a GOD to know your file's password so If this happens just send that password!`
    
    **2.** `Please don't send corrupted archives! If you sent a one by a mistake just send` **/clean** `command!`
    
    **3.** `If your archive have more than 90 files in it then bot can't show all the extracted files to select from. So in that case if you can't see your file in the buttons just click on` "Upload All вҷ»пёҸ" `button. It'll send all extracted files to you!`
help_upmode:
**How to change upload mode? рҹӨ”**

**1.** `Send` **/mode** `command to the bot.`
**2.** `Select the appropriate option.`
help_backup:
**How to backup my files рҹӨ”**

This bot's server do a clean restart every 24 hours (heroku). Which means your files will be completely removed after sometime.
Before that happens, you can backup all of your files to gofile.io

**1.** `Send` **/backup** `command to the bot.`
**2.** `Select the appropriate option.`
help_thumb:
**How to change thumbnail? рҹӨ”**

By default, videos uses a thumbnail generated by `ffmpeg` and files doesn't have one.
If you want to set up your own thumbnail, you can do so using below commands рҹ‘Ү,


    вҖў **/set_thumb** - To set a thumbnail

    вҖў **/get_thumb** - To get the current thumbnail

    вҖў **/del_thumb** - To delete the current thumbnail
help_lang:
**How to change the language? рҹӨ”**

The default language is English. However you can change it to your language if the translation is available. To change the current language send **/set_lang** command.

Want to help with translation?

failed_extract:
**Extraction Failed рҹҳ•!**

**What to do?**

 - `Please make sure archive isn't corrupted`
 - `Please make sure that you selected the right mode`
 - `May be Your archive format isn't supported рҹҳ”`

**Please report this at @anujedits76**
no_thumb: No thumbnails found. Please set one using `/set_thumb` command!
no_splitted_arc: `Dawg, this isn't a part of your splitted archive рҹҳ‘!`
ask_clean:
**Do you really want to delete your files from my server рҹӨ”?**

**Note:** `This action cannot be undone!`
select_upmode:
`Please select the upload mode by clicking on below buttons!`

**Current upload mode is:** `{}`
broadcast_started: `Broadcasting has started, This may take a while рҹҘұ!`
alert_splitted_arc:
**Splitted archive detected!**


**1.** `Send the other parts of the archive one by one.`
**2.** `When you're done, send` **/done** `command.`


Wanna cancel the current process? Hit **/clean** command!
alert_process_running_already:
`Already one process is going on, Don't spam you idiot рҹҳ‘!` 

Wanna cancel the current process? Just send **/clean** command!
alert_downloading_part: `Oh, looks like another part of the splitted archive was sent by YOU рҹ‘Җ!`
alert_part_exists: `Dawg, I already have this file рҹҳ‘!`
alert_sending_file: Sending the selected file to you. Please wait!
alert_sending_files: Sending all files to you. Please wait!
alert_file_too_large: `File size is too large to send in telegram рҹҘ¶! Trying to upload this file to gofile.io now рҹҳү!`
alert_empty_files: `Sorry, It looks like your files have been removed from the server рҹҳ”!`
alert_uploading_to_gofile: `Uploading extracted files to gofile.io! Please wait!`
